summary: A Fox News / Fox Weather broadcast clip ('FOX NEWS ALERT', LIVE banner, 'FOX WEATHER TRAVEL TRACKER' graphics) with correspondent William La Jeunesse reporting on ICE's 'Operation Highway Sentinel' arrests of 100+ allegedly illegal truckers in a California CDL sweep, including a flag graphic of drivers' home countries and ride-along enforcement B-roll. It is a recorded TV news segment, not an agency-produced music-driven video, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: ICE ARRESTS 100+ ILLEGAL TRUCKERS IN CA SWEEP; OPERATION HIGHWAY SENTINEL; BIG RIG DRIVERS HOME COUNTRIES; FOX NEWS ALERT; WILLIAM LA JEUNESSE SENIOR NATIONAL CORRESPONDENT
